name: @TeamHeinrich
subject: Martin vs. Gary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | _Everything_ in Martin's Senate race changed with Gary Johnson's candidacy, team. That's why we're rushing to raise rapid response funds so we can take on Johnson's national network of Libertarian backers.

**[Contribute $29 now and help us close our budget gap before midnight -- we only have $14,945 to go!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+ask+now+and+help+us+close+our&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5")**

_Begin original message by Brad Elkins:_

Our race got flipped on its head yesterday.

**Gary Johnson is officially challenging Martin for his Senate seat, and now Martin will be facing Johnson's national network of Libertarian backers.**

Read more below on what this means for our race and Democrats nationwide, or **[if you want to help us fight back immediately, contribute here->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+if+you+want+to+help+us+fight+back+immedi&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5")**

* * *

Yesterday, Gary Johnson entered the race against Martin, and **this could spell bad news for our campaign.**

Johnson is a former Libertarian presidential candidate with backers who could pour millions into his campaign against Martin. Plus, he already has his own super PAC ready to go all in to help his last-minute bid.

This is the _last thing_ Democrats need as we fight to defend Martin's seat and take back the Senate majority this November.
**[HELP MARTIN FIGHT BACK>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+HELP+MARTIN+FIGHT+BACK+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5")** Gary Johnson's policies are too extreme for the Senate. He wants to gut Medicare and Medicaid, repeal the ACA, raise the retirement age and get rid of the minimum wage.

**_[Yesterday Martin announced we needed to raise another $45,000 in rapid response funding to fight back against this latest news. Right now we're a little over halfway there. Please, can you help us close our new budget gap before midnight so we can take on Gary Johnson?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Yesterday+Martin+announced+we+needed+to+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_3_5")_**
_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_

Brad

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Vice President Pence Comes to Cincinnati
body:
Vice President Pence Comes to Cincinnati No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-z/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [V](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-j/)[ice President Pence Comes to Cincinnati](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-t/)
The Vice President of the United States was in town yesterday and I had the honor of introducing him at a panel discussion. I thought I'd give you a rundown of our day. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-i/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-d/)
### [What Does the Columbus Congressional Race Yesterday Mean? And Aftab Pureval Uses Your Tax Dollars as Hush Money.](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-h/)
Yesterday was a special election day here in Ohio, so I'm on the blog talking about the important 12th Congressional District and last night's results. I'm also discussing yet another shady thing my opponent, Aftab Pureval, has been up to and sharing my first ad! Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-k/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-u/)
### [The Persecution of Christians is Still With Us Today](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-o/)
We tend to think persecuting Christians is something that happened 2000 years ago. But the fact is, it's still going on in some parts of the world to this day. I'm on the blog talking about it today. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-b/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Are the Democrats Going to Take Back the House This Fall?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-p/)
The Washington political pundits (virtually all liberals) have been predicting a Democrat takeover for a while now. The most recent to join the chorus is Larry Sabato of the University of Virginia's Center for Politics. He now says Democrats are "soft favorites" to take over the House of Representatives. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-x/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjjkhijy-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Gun Task Force Watch (via Mike Thompson for Congress)
subject: 3D guns
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Anyone can buy a gun without a license or a background check. And there is no way to track these guns. We want to hear from you.

_[**Add your name if you believe people should not have access to 3D gun blueprints ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/TgyIqUakfThI122so4CPDstrE0nkihwOleVyfzVu4W4=/wbpYD5PbeOV0ovZJ7bExF0d5Rpyso-ztJA6F2eg17ak=)_

**\---------- Forwarded message ---------** | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TgyIqUakfThI122so4CPDstrE0nkihwOleVyfzVu4W4=/n77skCtZmqmMsbZp7BUmasG28oB7Gy0DkgSHd-jfTsI=)

Peter, I take my job to best serve the American people very seriously.

When I heard that the State Department is now allowing anyone to print a gun at home, I was outraged. This is an incredible threat to everyone's personal safety. This is out of the department's legal authority.

Allowing people to obtain a gun without a license or background check, or without a way to be traced by law enforcement must not be allowed.

People should not be able to print guns at home.

_**[We need to put serious pressure on the Trump administration now more than ever. Will you click here to let me know that you 're not afraid to tell the State Department to end this dangerous policy?](https://act.myngp.com/el/TgyIqUakfThI122so4CPDstrE0nkihwOleVyfzVu4W4=/n77skCtZmqmMsbZp7BUmasG28oB7Gy0DkgSHd-jfTsI=)**_

The State Department previously banned access to 3D gun blueprints because doing so would violate the Arms Control Export Act of 1974. Under Trump's Administration, it seems that the State Department decided to change its mind.

My colleagues and I sent a letter urging Secretary of State Mike Pompeo to protect the American people and ban access to 3D gun blueprints.

Far too many people are victims of preventable gun violence. **_[We cannot allow just anyone to own a gun. Add your name if you agree.](https://act.myngp.com/el/TgyIqUakfThI122so4CPDstrE0nkihwOleVyfzVu4W4=/n77skCtZmqmMsbZp7BUmasG28oB7Gy0DkgSHd-jfTsI=)_**

Thank you for standing with me.

Mike
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. clean_body: Anyone can buy a gun without a license or a background check. And there is no way to track these guns. We want to hear from you. = \---------- Forwarded message --------- | = Peter, I take my job to best serve the American people very seriously. When I heard that the State Department is now allowing anyone to print a gun at home, I was outraged. This is an incredible threat to everyone's personal safety. This is out of the department's legal authority. Allowing people to obtain a gun without a license or background check, or without a way to be traced by law enforcement must not be allowed. People should not be able to print guns at home. = The State Department previously banned access to 3D gun blueprints because doing so would violate the Arms Control Export Act of 1974. Under Trump's Administration, it seems that the State Department decided to change its mind. My colleagues and I sent a letter urging Secretary of State Mike Pompeo to protect the American people and ban access to 3D gun blueprints. Far too many people are victims of preventable gun violence. = Thank you for standing with me. Mike * Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Punishing drug dealers, not victims
body:
| |
---
The White House • August 16, 2018
## The Day Ahead
##
President Donald J. Trump is hosting a meeting of his Cabinet before sitting down with the Secretary of Homeland Security this afternoon.
## Punishing drug dealers, not victims
**In March, President Trump** laid out his three-part plan to combat America’s deadly opioid crisis: reducing demand, cutting off illicit suppliers, and expanding opportunities for proven treatment. **A key part** of the plan is law enforcement’s role in tackling opioid abuse and halting the spread of addiction in our communities. Earlier this summer, Attorney General Jeff Sessions announced the launch of Operation Synthetic Opioids Surge (SOS), which embraces a zero-tolerance policy toward synthetic opioid trafficking **“I sent more than 300 new assistant US attorneys** to districts across America, including one to Maine. It was the largest prosecutor surge in decades,” the Attorney General writes. “Having served as a federal prosecutor for 14 years, I know what a difference that can make.” **This operation punishes the right people** : distributors of illegal drugs, not the victims suffering from addiction. For these victims, the Trump Administration is pursuing ways to expand evidence-based treatment, such as ensuring that first responders are supplied with lifesaving medication used to reverse overdoses. **[Attorney General Sessions: How law enforcement is taking action on opioids](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE2LjkzNzQzNzUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNi45Mzc0Mzc1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcxNDkyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/law-enforcement-taking-action-opioid-crisis/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)** **Share your story** : [**Americans are feeling the weight of the Crisis Next Door**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE2LjkzNzQzNzUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNi45Mzc0Mzc1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcxNDkyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.crisisnextdoor.gov/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# A quiet revolution
**Policies can change** with each new Administration, but restoring our nation's courts with judges committed to interpreting the law—not creating it—will benefit Americans for years to come. **Supreme Court nominations** get the most attention, and Judge Brett Kavanaugh’s confirmation to the High Court will indeed be a landmark win for conservatives. But given the sheer volume of cases in America, lower courts offer the last word in thousands of rulings each year. **“With little fanfare****,** Trump and [Senate Majority Leader Mitch] McConnell reshape the nation’s circuit courts,” _The Washington Post_ reported this week. “With 24 confirmations and 13 vacancies to fill, Trump and the Republicans have the power to install more than 20 percent of the judges on the nation’s second-highest courts.” **The Senate has already confirmed** more of President Trump’s appellate judges than any President during his first two years in office. The result will be a Federal judiciary that is far more committed to the rule of law than to the rule of judges. [**“With little fanfare, Trump and McConnell reshape the nation’s circuit courts”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE2LjkzNzQzNzUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNi45Mzc0Mzc1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcxNDkyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/washington-post-little-fanfare-trump-mcconnell-reshape-nations-circuit-courts/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **More : [What to know about President Trump’s Supreme Court nominee](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE2LjkzNzQzNzUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNi45Mzc0Mzc1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcxNDkyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/scotus/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen
**Vice President Mike Pence meets with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, Supreme Court Nominee Judge Brett Kavanaugh, and former United States Senator Jon Kyl** | July 10, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE2LjkzNzQzNzUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNi45Mzc0Mzc1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcxNDkyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE2LjkzNzQzNzUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNi45Mzc0Mzc1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcxNDkyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE2LjkzNzQzNzUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNi45Mzc0Mzc1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcxNDkyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

body:
Republicans are plastering the airwaves with ads attacking my record and character. I'm not complaining -- I know that's what happens in a competitive race. But these attacks are unrelenting. And if |

But these attacks are unrelenting. And if we let them go unanswered, they'll start swaying undecided Hoosiers.

That's where our mid-month goal comes in. If we can reach $15,000 by tonight, we'll be able to fight back on the air, and more importantly, on the ground. That's where this race will be won.

subject: 12 Saturdays Left!
body:

This weekend, Republican volunteers across New Hampshire will knock on doors, make phone calls, participate in parades, and meet voters at fairs and community events. **Can we count on you to take action to ensure Republican victory in November? **[Click here.](nh.gop/august)
We will be out in full force this weekend to share our **#LeadRight** agenda and get out the vote.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Guess what percent of cases the Supreme Court overturns
body:
Peter,
Christian baker, Jack Phillips, is being challenged in court _again_. Even after the Supreme Court in June overwhelmingly ruled in his favor 7-2 to protect his religious freedom, overturning an earlier ruling from the Colorado Court of Appeals.
Now the Colorado State Commission is moving against Phillips because he refused to violate his religious convictions by baking a custom cake celebrating a transgender transition.
This just reminds us that both the lower courts and the Supreme Court are extremely important. We need to keep a close eye on this case as it develops and faithfully pray for our courts.
**Do you know what percent of cases the Supreme Court overturns from the lower court? Select your answer from one of the buttons below and see if you are right!**
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Flower-court-cases-overturned-scotus-2017%2F%3Fa%3D1&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180816qna01&n=1)

clean_body: Peter, Christian baker, Jack Phillips, is being challenged in court again. Even after the Supreme Court in June overwhelmingly ruled in his favor 7-2 to protect his religious freedom, overturning an earlier ruling from the Colorado Court of Appeals. Now the Colorado State Commission is moving against Phillips because he refused to violate his religious convictions by baking a custom cake celebrating a transgender transition. This just reminds us that both the lower courts and the Supreme Court are extremely important. We need to keep a close eye on this case as it develops and faithfully pray for our courts. Do you know what percent of cases the Supreme Court overturns from the lower court? Select your answer from one of the buttons below and see if you are right! United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Five million Americans say it's time to impeach
body:
Activist -

The entire world watched the day Donald Trump took Vladimir Putin’s side in Helsinki, finally seeing what so many of us have been seeing for so long.

The world saw President Trump deny that Putin orchestrated a cyber-attack on our 2016 elections -- and deny the consensus of our intelligence community that Russia is already attempting to attack our elections again this year.

There’s a name for siding with a hostile foreign dictator against the American people and their democracy: Treason. And Donald Trump’s treason has put our nation’s very democracy at risk.

Impeachment was written into the Constitution to remove a president who, just like Trump, betrays the American people. Join our movement and demand his impeachment now!

Show you’re in today: Yes, I will stand with Need to Impeach now and demand Congress impeach President Trump. (http://www.needtoimpeach.com/impeach-trump-putin-lb/?utm_source=partner&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=demsdotcom-list-rental&utm_content=nti-lb_trump-putin)

Last month Special Counsel Robert Mueller indicted 12 Russian intelligence officers for hacking party platforms and stealing information from half a million American voters. That makes for 35 indictments in the investigation of Russian interference and related crimes, along with five guilty pleas — so far.

Trump dismissed these allegations because Putin — who was standing next to him at the time, after a two-hour private meeting — “was extremely strong and powerful in his denial.”

Since when does the U.S. president take the word of the leader of Russia on matters of national security? We cannot let this stand. We cannot allow ourselves to be led by a compromised president who not only allows but defends foreign attacks on our nation’s most elemental democratic processes.

We need to impeach Donald Trump.

We can’t wait any longer. Stand with Need To Impeach to defend democracy and help demand the impeachment of this compromised president. (http://www.needtoimpeach.com/impeach-trump-putin-lb/?utm_source=partner&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=demsdotcom-list-rental&utm_content=nti-lb_trump-putin)

More than 5.5 million Americans have joined our movement so far. Every day, more and more people are realizing that we cannot let this president endanger our democracy any longer.

Thank you,

Tom Steyer
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMzg5LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjMxNTkzNTA2

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Campaign Manager Stacy Schuster
subject: Menendez Turns to Enron Billionaire to Save Political Career
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
We’re less than 100 days away from electing Marine veteran and job creator Bob Hugin to restore honor and integrity for New Jersey in the United State | |
---
|
---
Peter,

We’re less than 100 days away from electing Marine veteran and job creator Bob Hugin to restore honor and integrity for New Jersey in the United States Senate. With each passing day, corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez loses support from New Jerseyans who have had enough of his corruption and ineffectiveness.

Now that Menendez’s biggest campaign donor and felon “best friend” Sal Melgen is behind bars, he’s desperately looking to anyone who can help him save his political career. Melgen recently had his motion for a retrial denied and is serving 17 years in prison for **[“stealing $73 million from Medicare by persuading elderly patients to undergo excruciating tests and treatments they didn't need for diseases they didn't have.”](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=e0d9482c52274d6785588196c9312c98&_e=CICBjJht8NWKLTb_bx40ZqxsJ6HAksOlSi_OzGVIYpLjIkT_QApUe2F0fClLAZkZxJ-z3htYPdRSKeFJO9bosKzLsQJWEneIzxQvUpmqwvojmbQyuWsG8brtOvjArPqnkluv9k_GZLZWQ3uqPEFqEubffaxgnpDTh7BVzfHUkTUb3jj8LLvj-SS4anV-n0Pf4Iz3kKq8-oDUD-hRXmj5TuwpxmnDek3D6DpwHTYnNDoPuwWGibZYN_bS4r2JxqqcWBM1DZiDcgObK7D7kKMSMaxRrGVuu48O5c8kOS8OFtz9QGvasrSoqZcHus552heBGqXhoPEPM2Q6DePpNblaO-uWfdqw5uBC_BPTBA9ayXAigiXydME5r1X3eIB3m1_adJe63ssZlycZZUH9wIcHd0ot9-4Xj9js7G4A16B3kPG8bVfrc1Fg3cpzsGN0xlQN)**

_**Enron-Connected Billionaire Tries to Bail Out Bob Menendez in New Jersey Senate Race**_
New Jersey knows that Bob Menendez doesn’t represent our values so he’s making a last ditch effort to try and get re-elected. His latest act of desperation is turning to John Arnold, a Texas billionaire who made his first million with Enron, a Wall Street company infamous for it’s accounting fraud scheme. Arnold has teamed up with a career Democrat operative and is funding Super PAC attack ads that are lying about Bob Hugin’s record.

“Arnold’s idea of 'doing good' this election cycle is to come to the political rescue of Sen. Bob Menendez, the New Jersey Democrat who was rebuked in a public letter of admonition from the Senate Ethics Committee and barely escaped an indictment for public corruption after a mistrial was declared in November on charges brought against him by the Department of Justice (DOJ).”

Click **[HERE](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=e0d9482c52274d6785588196c9312c98&_e=CICBjJht8NWKLTb_bx40ZiZqtYJ9j5T-jmTFZwJ1Su0EjYoL9ceNQROf9e4YHZjaUptIBgeqrdBdiJcnIxB6j0EGlh-GqvRvloXHBg76Kml7SsntdA-SntgdnwmjKG2lkidRrFuU2rpJbLugTro9-3IhyMEAVFB7rZaCVvKqQIskeJOZ2hVwY_qEK8xoIKkUpOmkvEvX-FUyLbPKrlGaMAr4-FCFhlyT6d7t0FyS-W1g18DzmmkH-LQ9O1ZyBUU_3QGHSK9vQkieakjyBjPVyjB7q1PqW4CfGn1qkxDXHvyqEbGR15YPDTzPsIXzmRgu727ZxDkPpwPwzCt8z7Zq155WfAh49EWhkE-QhrKsF4ZfVNb1UVINQhz_2RKq79wIpACK6ZrmeL-Xwv2H9Wk7gv8bMFVlU2cKuMK4ecE0YeyKqnZjrbazkPswk42a_rtx1peduv-0pkaHSW1IEzFnvuMFtIlQ6DdTzKDiPT6_cc4deDuJz83q0j0E9s7BEJDQvQVfNRjpbSiI2bYrgbg8EXwSSNVf_r8Cr-L3hkt89EtrFp4lTR3JkSY8wclWo3As)** to read more.

_**Career Dem Operative Teams Up With Corrupt Bob Menendez**_
[**Matt Rooney from Save Jersey broke this story wide open**](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=e0d9482c52274d6785588196c9312c98&_e=CICBjJht8NWKLTb_bx40Zm32RJOTdlH1AjNdr64AWBHfhHD0bPayhmxmXFuUbnY0xXgd-UPMBxllz_NFBverTo0IwBMprF6Bqrp4LK0qdWlUG4ym__YZMgcvY465gno-1cNqKFsB_wZD-40T68OtXf5vasRK6VRLYErtuHfsLyhYj0Qo4gpTeo5wmcemNOEA2xsOnfuIZN_ihC_C5gYQLLzD1HDkc43BXAdfkSi5n2Us7lC9nhCFWZOHMSMsDQA7_99XXmigyiq-S9DFoodv7LtANBWdIDdJewFUpktrHlVSXJ5-I3SJGaXJ_RAn935a00U572GjRhTtAZNbNgUj_fI-Y7Wi_YMyVMwzgpUzHlw_gmPvCFQA-4T0S8Po4DWhJnsNbXX-IRdceNVloC7XbCbctp-B-XN1OSWwlfwExgOzVDbTgn6F8Iyi_INDaSRTTH2XE5Axa2IZMORoJfApcjZeRWyqYeV7VzIMkWxjMduQW7t-_GOr4pnxZqFC4ZQ9Dv7kcR8Zf7I1IYRFetGg5Xo_FS2_OXRH4hPern4WWH8%3D) and shed some light on Bob Menendez’s desperate move to smear and lie about Bob Hugin’s record.

David Mitchell promotes himself as the leader of a “bipartisan Super PAC” called Patients for Affordable Drugs Action,” but he’s really a fraud. **[Mitchell is a career Democrat operative, media consultant, and campaign contributor whose public affairs and political consulting firm got paid millions by the pharmaceutical industry.](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=e0d9482c52274d6785588196c9312c98&_e=xG_aWDHDUMrPK20m0iQ2LJlZkY-KqR21DV5drqYeUu6knbUm2_a3aYmQiasqY0xljiFRbW2krsJKh9K7JFaIm-1eVFxd2ArOn8Mi81lsEqDu1Zeh5gE0NNU0VgOv8O7y4CK99-Kh6OwJou6qN-9KuviWp0Mdn_N9FhOLjrgc7DjM0k9CDCCAmvVvKUUyHWAQvgtnjKo2PjLQIlsCgNDKmBDSZfer6q8aslRwnnbwMWWO0Xgjv7dSTakBNOd893gBeBKFoEGPLp9LK34Iq0pDZdC2HEs3J6_2gcyk9G-I6SoUwGZ-qVaEcL-bE4uHQ_igdnKc4vxT78P6Wd49CUiaOqV-f9OISgDIE6xCXCkoayfDEz3oxO0oWW2NtiYLMAutJln7m-VrfqDZTs2dki1YQ2a7ow1U8zFVDXyuP7Yt2af2WrnaZ20GwNezU4k6-msK)**

Moreover, just like the corrupt, career politician he’s backing, Bob Menendez – who took and failed to report $1 million in illegal gifts – Mitchell’s organization also has trouble following the rules. Mitchell failed to follow Maryland state law and file the necessary paperwork with the State Department of Assessments and Taxation, meaning they are currently operating illegally.

Click **[HERE](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=e0d9482c52274d6785588196c9312c98&_e=CICBjJht8NWKLTb_bx40Zm32RJOTdlH1AjNdr64AWBHfhHD0bPayhmxmXFuUbnY0xXgd-UPMBxllz_NFBverTo0IwBMprF6Bqrp4LK0qdWlUG4ym__YZMgcvY465gno-1cNqKFsB_wZD-40T68OtXf5vasRK6VRLYErtuHfsLyhYj0Qo4gpTeo5wmcemNOEA2xsOnfuIZN_ihC_C5gYQLLzD1HDkc43BXAdfkSi5n2Us7lC9nhCFWZOHMSMsDQA7_99XXmigyiq-S9DFoodv7LtANBWdIDdJewFUpktrHlVSXJ5-I3SJGaXJ_RAn935a00U572GjRhTtAZNbNgUj_bfST9q5uS7jydZV7pFZ9MoUoHrGVnk0-rrVdbR6ZZCs_BJr4J0kJC-_3jrJ6CqpWDqsodK71QW5m4KTbcjRbXC7R4_zFcGNBLhKJH4ZWghtTWRdH6eWk5FLSVWB0RnuaSAYbo0c1-9qooqQPwbKucLKAS1hTlxMnQ41QpTT1m233hns_WzNa7pWIDdi-bCDeSuFlpBv1fq5mxy8HaYJLL8%3D)** to read more.

_**Menendez’s “Best Friend” and Infamous Medicare Fraudster Melgen Denied Bail**_
Bob Menendez’s co-defendant, “best friend,” and biggest campaign donor, Sal Melgen, **[had his motion for a new trial denied](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=e0d9482c52274d6785588196c9312c98&_e=CICBjJht8NWKLTb_bx40ZpDznQwFrz17CJJSxXCDPUgpuVdiKOryqJPN1tSVzTiJB4tZLndaQMvbd2CRyFFqpoWGIasj8UCzUC7U_z8XoJUpqnAvJ3VDUGjZGlSVSqjAKrjowA4f4AEvoz-ubd38XLFj6hcBMixM-F6X4DhkX-LBdATmrZxhXhgfsXrFFcpmxkGk9HNDH_eJU3AqubIdEgs1L7q060xvwPm9dZN51vjyHMaTr5_AEtrd-Tt2AxFuOKawLIrbHs84XIXu61xOv_GRAI5aj8Q54Agv8pNRyk6NLNugcSsC3Bqsvc-b4yHJjnKLyGEbB0eImfSO-gpOI8MQeaqAqyehH_Vc_RQfgwdRbAASRvlL9IQKBAJ8sRAacc12X3VrX2RnCNgTRGS95WQfiXzZR8AOIDY3V_kiXCiQBxb7pWy67Uqby0hSO1T7PGLODzvYVrxmz9s3wsBdoviUciA-O7vNyWrocnXMNu1eBuRuSdycLVeIw7JLZRbsq8ze5nmoFkQ5rGU6x57NCUdVHoV3il0uYD0bNWU7n_1A9JK9VJNJbO14Ta9lyE_X)**. Melgen scammed seniors, blinded patients, and performed “horrific” unnecessary procedures to scam millions from Medicare.

Now that Melgen has been held accountable, it’s time for Bob Menendez to be held accountable too. Menendez violated federal law by taking $1 million in illegal gifts and abused his office to intervene in the Obama Justice Department’s investigation into Melgen’s Medicare fraud scheme. Menendez is refusing to amend his financial disclosure and pay back Melgen’s dirty money as ordered by the bipartisan Senate Ethics Committee. When is Menendez going to comply? It’s time for him to come clean and pay up.

[ **Donate To Hold Menendez Accountable** ](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=e0d9482c52274d6785588196c9312c98&_e=CICBjJht8NWKLTb_bx40Zic-kQt99y_18I1tWeh3XZZsb4iW1wiR6BNSktMl0FZ45Zi3bmXGUkIYU6YSBBrn2lIxYZ8TEg_zr4RSCxcktPF7xIxcmmfaYWTFqrtvqRNe_D9YZURLMI5IaAKSsrY7B3Fw_YNGJB5mPDrOezF7Ye3mSvCAhaCy39_-jWquURUqZznZy2jpTLrH-xRyDvYZVDOzoVr7AYwRwOkyGydkU4IFrpV368FwctBbjnYzXtDQogjrqrl6E1dpzn7GlgLLtbRaOPf2wxqv3pEuVfoSwY_wmNEuxHEhzQPFQ3_1FBFildqtxUgc9zJlayZMr_flCtZe_2J8KTRSSn-c-COXJK-wNEMkpN_c_TW-zXuNW1b2q0sgxooJ7FylsHX-FKxbcfvbGO6zx4b0ekWvE-weeIHrKYogxyACZaSJ5eVeQEtkL5p6ML_e9V7-J4Buv8P4ic5SnzZAoXnzQGviwc2E5J8%3D)

Stacy Schuster

clean_body: We’re less than 100 days away from electing Marine veteran and job creator Bob Hugin to restore honor and integrity for New Jersey in the United State | | | Peter, We’re less than 100 days away from electing Marine veteran and job creator Bob Hugin to restore honor and integrity for New Jersey in the United States Senate. With each passing day, corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez loses support from New Jerseyans who have had enough of his corruption and ineffectiveness. Now that Menendez’s biggest campaign donor and felon “best friend” Sal Melgen is behind bars, he’s desperately looking to anyone who can help him save his political career. Melgen recently had his motion for a retrial denied and is serving 17 years in prison for Enron-Connected Billionaire Tries to Bail Out Bob Menendez in New Jersey Senate Race New Jersey knows that Bob Menendez doesn’t represent our values so he’s making a last ditch effort to try and get re-elected. His latest act of desperation is turning to John Arnold, a Texas billionaire who made his first million with Enron, a Wall Street company infamous for it’s accounting fraud scheme. Arnold has teamed up with a career Democrat operative and is funding Super PAC attack ads that are lying about Bob Hugin’s record. “Arnold’s idea of 'doing good' this election cycle is to come to the political rescue of Sen. Bob Menendez, the New Jersey Democrat who was rebuked in a public letter of admonition from the Senate Ethics Committee and barely escaped an indictment for public corruption after a mistrial was declared in November on charges brought against him by the Department of Justice (DOJ).” Click to read more. Career Dem Operative Teams Up With Corrupt Bob Menendez and shed some light on Bob Menendez’s desperate move to smear and lie about Bob Hugin’s record. David Mitchell promotes himself as the leader of a “bipartisan Super PAC” called Patients for Affordable Drugs Action,” but he’s really a fraud. Moreover, just like the corrupt, career politician he’s backing, Bob Menendez – who took and failed to report $1 million in illegal gifts – Mitchell’s organization also has trouble following the rules. Mitchell failed to follow Maryland state law and file the necessary paperwork with the State Department of Assessments and Taxation, meaning they are currently operating illegally. Click to read more. Menendez’s “Best Friend” and Infamous Medicare Fraudster Melgen Denied Bail Bob Menendez’s co-defendant, “best friend,” and biggest campaign donor, Sal Melgen, . Melgen scammed seniors, blinded patients, and performed “horrific” unnecessary procedures to scam millions from Medicare. Now that Melgen has been held accountable, it’s time for Bob Menendez to be held accountable too. Menendez violated federal law by taking $1 million in illegal gifts and abused his office to intervene in the Obama Justice Department’s investigation into Melgen’s Medicare fraud scheme. Menendez is refusing to amend his financial disclosure and pay back Melgen’s dirty money as ordered by the bipartisan Senate Ethics Committee. When is Menendez going to comply? It’s time for him to come clean and pay up. | Thank you for your support. Together, we will elect a Senator that New Jersey can be proud of. Stacy Schuster Campaign Manager | | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Instagram" "Web Site" | | | Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc. | | PO BOX 8656, Somerville, NJ 08876 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
This is a must-see poll (important).

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a0ba/c1f7015/6a56fabf/1141b5f5/2422846637/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180816_em-full") Friends, we told you about the special interests attacks on Tina that just hit the airwaves -- it looks like they are working. Here's the latest poll: **_Emerson College Poll: MN Senate Race (8/8-8/11)_** Tina Smith (D): 32%
Karin Housley (R): 28% Republicans have targeted this seat since the moment Tina took office -- and now they see this race is within four points. **We can only expect millions more in special interest dollars, and even more attacks from Donald Trump and Mike Pence.** **[This is not an election we can afford to lose. Will you rush a contribution of $5 or more so we can respond and stop Trump from turning this crucial Senate seat red?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a0ba/c1f7015/6a56fabf/1141b5f6/2422846637/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180816_em-full&recurring=auto")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a0ba/c1f7015/6a56fabf/1141b5f7/2422846637/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180816_em-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

We cannot afford to leave anything to chance. **This seat is critical to taking back the Senate and stopping Trump 's agenda -- and now polls are calling it a "dead heat."**
And we can't forget, Trump came within 1.5 points of winning Minnesota in 2016, so we know this race will be close.
Trump and Pence have already traveled to Minnesota to rally their supporters, and we have to assume they're going to draw an even bigger target on this race now. Can we count on you to help us respond?
**[Rush a contribution of $5 or more so we can defend this seat and stop Trump and Pence from turning Minnesota red. Team Tina

body:

| | | Friend,

I think it is important for voters to know who Courtney Tritch is, and each of her rallies provides a more complete picture of her views as a full time left wing activist.

Here are a few social media posts from the speakers she invited to her rally yesterday.

This radical left-wing activism is not just offensive, but out of touch with northeast Indiana. Jim Banks is not only committed, but looks forward to debating her as we get closer to Election Day. In the meantime, I think our very liberal opponent owes us all some answers.

[Will you help](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=446d470122&e=bfe3be83a5)[ us fight back by joining our conservative grassroots team today?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=f1526befbb&e=bfe3be83a5)

name: Leah
subject: 🚨 We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
When we started this race we knew it wouldn't be easy. We had to take on the naysayers, the out-of-state mega donors, and swamp tactics...

Friend, when we started this race we knew it wouldn't be easy.

We had to take on the naysayers, the out-of-state mega donors, and swamp tactics...

And throughout it all, we delivered our conservative message all across the state.

In May, we won at convention. But on Tuesday, we won at the polls.

And friend, I want to say THANK YOU for everything you did to make it happen.

We fought hard, we fought honorably for a good mission, and we proved that the America First, grassroots conservative movement is alive and well. And we're coming for Senator Baldwin!

clean_body: When we started this race we knew it wouldn't be easy. We had to take on the naysayers, the out-of-state mega donors, and swamp tactics... Friend, when we started this race we knew it wouldn't be easy. We had to take on the naysayers, the out-of-state mega donors, and swamp tactics... And throughout it all, we delivered our conservative message all across the state. In May, we won at convention. But on Tuesday, we won at the polls. And friend, I want to say THANK YOU for everything you did to make it happen. We fought hard, we fought honorably for a good mission, and we proved that the America First, grassroots conservative movement is alive and well. And we're coming for Senator Baldwin! Our race is really just getting started. Liberals know we stand in the way of their hope of controlling the Senate. They will make me their number one target as we get closer to election day. But friend, I’m ready. And I’m hoping you’ll stand by my side through this fight to help me deliver the Wisconsin Way in DC. But here’s the thing: I really need your support as we continue. I’m setting a goal of raising $50,000 this week to kick off our OFFICIAL general election campaign, and I’m hoping you’ll become one of my first supporters of this part of our campaign. Friend, let’s make sure we continue to be bold, we continue to make our voices heard, and we stay vigilant in our goal to end Washington dysfunction. I know we can do it, as long as we work together. Please, chip in now: Thanks in advance, friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

subject: I'm not exaggerating (please read)

| | Here's a thought that should get us all fired up. **Thanks to the passage of the Fair Districts Amendments, Democrats in November have a number of competitive seats that we can win.** My team and I have been working day and night campaigning in Florida. We have critical races up and down the ticket. [**You can help us by pitching in $5 to fund our Get Out the Vote efforts.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f74/622b7b5b/1c45d5bb/307b94e4/4053331514/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180816z?refcode=dwse180816z_m&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f74/622b7b5b/1c45d5bb/307b94e7/4053331514/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwODE2eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180816z?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse180816z_m_5&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f74/622b7b5b/1c45d5bb/307b94e7/4053331514/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwODE2eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180816z?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse180816z_m_10&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f74/622b7b5b/1c45d5bb/307b94e7/4053331514/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwODE2eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180816z?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse180816z_m_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f74/622b7b5b/1c45d5bb/307b94e6/4053331514/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwODE2eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180816z?refcode=dwse180816z_m_other&refcode2=861769")** Right now, we have an opportunity to do more than stop Donald Trump. We can elect enough Democrats to take back the House and the Senate. **But right-wing Super PACs are in damage-control mode. They are dumping cash into close races and pulling out all the stops to protect their majority.** That's why we can't get complacent. Together, we need to finish an important task. We have to defeat the party that helped an unqualified bigot rise to prominence. [**This is a big deal, so we need a big response. Please give $5 to fuel our Get Out the Vote efforts. body:
|
#
Peter -- Thanks to grassroots supporters like you stepping up and helping us get Phil Bredesen's message in front of voters, we still have the momentum in this race. We know that is making a lot of people in the Washington establishment angry. They don’t like that Governor Bredesen is challenging the status quo, and they have the money -- from out-of-state mega donors -- to give us a tough fight in this race. **But Governor Bredesen doesn’t want this campaign to be focused on all that -- he wants this campaign focused on ideas that bring people together to help fix the mess in Washington.** Our campaign is open to anyone who is tired of the partisan squabbling and wants to bring common sense leadership to the Senate. And I know if we have resources to put our message in front of voters, we will win. **So I’m asking you:** [**Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us reach our goal for tomorrow’s deadline? Due to popular demand, we’re bringing back the opportunity to
become a member of Team Lipinski!

For over a decade, Congressman Lipinski has been putting in
the time, energy, and work to fight for Illinois families, and he
needs your help to keep going. We’re looking for 100 new
supporters to activate their membership to join Team Lipinski
before midnight Friday!

name: Kerry Gooch, Paul Davis for Congress
subject: We wanted you to be the first to see:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Itk24bb2DBzdIGh08s31QHp7Q_XDyeXFq1JTp2YqFBc=/Vn4PwHEcq870sXMuA6IPMNq3YiJM91ZA0TDot6oYUxQ=?gpsid=13_36_2935&refcode=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&noskip=true)
Peter,

It's been only a little over a week since the primary election, but we've already hit the ground running as we head to the general election on Tuesday, November 6!

We just launched our first TV ad of the general election, and as one of Paul's dedicated supporters, we wanted to make sure you were one of the first to see it. **[Check out the video now and then chip in whatever you can afford to make sure folks across Kansas' 2nd District can see it too!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Itk24bb2DBzdIGh08s31QHp7Q_XDyeXFq1JTp2YqFBc=/Vn4PwHEcq870sXMuA6IPMNq3YiJM91ZA0TDot6oYUxQ=?gpsid=13_36_2935&refcode=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&noskip=true)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Itk24bb2DBzdIGh08s31QHp7Q_XDyeXFq1JTp2YqFBc=/Vn4PwHEcq870sXMuA6IPMNq3YiJM91ZA0TDot6oYUxQ=?gpsid=13_36_2935&refcode=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&noskip=true)
---

[WATCH PAUL'S NEW AD](https://act.myngp.com/el/Itk24bb2DBzdIGh08s31QHp7Q_XDyeXFq1JTp2YqFBc=/Vn4PwHEcq870sXMuA6IPMNq3YiJM91ZA0TDot6oYUxQ=?gpsid=13_36_2935&refcode=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&noskip=true)

There's no hiding the truth: Congress is in a state of dysfunction. Kansans aren't being heard and our problems aren't getting solved -- and all because our so-called "leaders" are too busy fighting with each other to get anything done. But problems don't get solved by pointing fingers and playing partisan games -- they get solved when we work together.

Paul has a proven track record of working with anybody who has commonsense ideas for helping middle-class families -- no matter their political party. He's the proven bipartisan leader we need for Kansas to get results.

**[Peter, watch our new TV ad and then chip in $5 or more to help us keep it on the air as long as possible.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Itk24bb2DBzdIGh08s31QHp7Q_XDyeXFq1JTp2YqFBc=/Vn4PwHEcq870sXMuA6IPMNq3YiJM91ZA0TDot6oYUxQ=?gpsid=13_36_2935&refcode=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&noskip=true)**

Thank you,

Kerry Gooch
Campaign Manager

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Itk24bb2DBzdIGh08s31QHp7Q_XDyeXFq1JTp2YqFBc=/Vn4PwHEcq870sXMuA6IPMNq3YiJM91ZA0TDot6oYUxQ=?gpsid=13_36_2935&refcode=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180816_NewAd1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: re: our new goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
As you might have heard, I've been named the most vulnerable Democratic member of the House, and so my team is running a very aggressive, grassroots campaign.
friend, I hope you take a minute to read the message below from my finance director, Lindsay. We sat down yesterday and went over our fundraising progress, and we've increased our online goal for the month in light of some new developments on the campaign trail. As you might have heard, I've been named the most vulnerable Democratic member of the House, and so my team is running a very aggressive, grassroots campaign on the ground to make sure I can continue serving Arizona families in Congress. **[We increased our goal to make sure we have sufficient resources to carry out all our plans, and I need your help today to make sure we're on track to meet it. Can you chip in a donation of any amount to help us?](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.16_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you for the support, friend -- you're a critical member of this team. Yours, Tom \-----forwarded message----- From: Lindsay Coleman Subject: we've increased our goal Things are heating up here in AZ-01, team -- so I've increased our mid-month fundraising goal to make sure we can keep our campaign going strong. We're running **$3,211** behind this new online target, though, and our deadline is tomorrow... [**can you make a donation today so we can hit this goal and keep AZ-01 blue in November?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.16_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Now, you might be wondering -- why are we increasing our goals this far along in the election year? _Well, a lot has happened over the past few days ..._
* A GOP Super PAC dropped even MORE MONEY (in addition to an earlier **$50,000!**) to boost one of Tom's far-right opponents.
* _The AZ Daily Sun_ reported that a big national GOP group is planning its biggest investment in Arizona ever, and AZ-01 is one of its top targets.
* Tom is still the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the entire House, so it's on us to make sure these developments don't slow our momentum.

All this news might intimidate some campaigns, team -- but here at Team O'Halleran, we don't get scared in the face of bad news. We get ORGANIZED, which is what this new goal will allow us to do. With [**your support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.16_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer="), we'll continue ramping up our voter outreach efforts and we'll fight the Super PACs with our own ads on TV. [**Please, make a donation today so we can keep it up and win this race >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.16_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Lindsay Coleman Finance Director | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.16_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [_clicking here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fe1/1a8421e1/1a503acf0/48cd21a3/879927245/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/update-your-information").

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fe1/1a8421e1/1a503acf0/48cd21a4/879927245/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonians. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fe1/1a8421e1/1a503acf0/48cd21a5/879927245/VEsP/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe"). If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fe1/1a8421e1/1a503acf0/48cd21a6/879927245/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleran?refcode=email_footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000"). Thanks for having Tom's back!

subject: August Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| |
---
### **Abigail at the Henrico Filipino Festival**

### **Henrico Panel Discussion on National Security with Sen. Tim Kaine, Ned Price, and Fmr. VA Technology Secretary Karen Jackson**

### **Team Spanberger Volunteers Canvassing Henrico County**

### **Wilderness Run Community Gathering**
****
### **Volunteers Calling Voters at Campaign HQ Phone Bank**

### **NBC 12 Interviews Abigail**

**Our 116th Meet and Greet**
### **Packed Room at the Lake of the Woods Unity Reception**

### See more photos on [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/2C7N8xVGSH11U19CocaHyEPi1sB4jNQeQLf_LiO8EUY=), [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/ETGOmfqQR_JJOXMQi4X_r_Mle1o58p49VehmwrX7cWs=), and [Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/BrHFIMCclnKKJ_Wnp810HgSHeW-NYv_oozoQlInCT7c=).
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/PVIktoGgxsno_SpV_IrCdAfN0fP3Fcy-9_KHSIi12Hk=?refcode=july18newsletter) | **News** Only 82 days until the election!

**New TV Ad:** We're proud to announce our first TV ad in the general election, "Values," started airing last week (view on [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/NuJYvRZXSCDuZivVlErZFcQ8s5Za49aga3YVPJPIYvs=), [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/UnhvLoWcmYOnLAjyLCG0bagskqGoEZ3i5wLdTt2bolY=) and share with your friends!). We're excited about this ad because it gives insight into Abigail's motivations for entering public service.

**Endorsements:** On August 1st, [Lt. Governor Justin Fairfax endorsed our campaign](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/1Nhxn_FpApcMBpC-6wXv60iD12pSKhfm3OcoSLaBxsg=). Previously on July 25, our campaign was also [endorsed by Senator Mark Warner](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/aNuXLZUuFAlu1lpDSIxDjfLw6MJsg-SKQz_F6IRSoME=). This follows previous endorsements from [Senator Tim Kaine](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/UgG-oAboirktVQI4oifR9s76u9SC-TIdj9pdY0FQNec=) and [Governor Ralph Northam](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/jYcldf3eu9BhRAjkZA2vcWZFOoRCX17tLSMJyAMHgdM=). These endorsements show the growing confidence in our ability to beat Rep. Brat in November.

The new yard signs for the general election have arrived! Yard signs can be ordered from our [campaign website](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/N9PNqFUdNeqrQDWT1cKuj0XbIZPtVlQEJGa8ANUAPa4=), or if you prefer, they can be picked up at our campaign office in Henrico.

With fewer than three months to go until the November 6th election, please continue spreading the word about our campaign and encouraging your friends and neighbors to vote for Abigail! With all of your support, we will flip the 7th in November!

See below for what's new with the campaign, and thank you for your continued support.
**Volunteers**
We now have over 2,400 Team Spanberger volunteers working throughout the 7th District knocking on doors, making calls to voters, and spreading the word about our campaign. It's incredible to see how much Team Spanberger has grown in just the past few months. Around the district, the energy and enthusiasm for Abigail's campaign is amazing and no doubt this is due to the extraordinary work of our volunteers.

We need all hands on deck for the final months of the general election. If you would like to join the team, [please sign up on our volunteer list](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/oAO_goulg0PMezoyHRT70cMwfCBc7kkHkIWJR3w0tik=)[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/JULRQR-3zKINnlEwfdQm_M9vw6u6iwIyDVS1jeyxOno=)or jump right in by [picking a day to knock doors or call voters](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/Xr5eZJyhx9TSHCAd9vXLg5yorbVkmmpjwXf8cEU47yQ=). Remember to invite a friend (or two!).

For volunteer-related questions, please email our Deputy Field Director, MacKenzie Miller at [mackenzie@abigailspanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/MroyaDWEaSAd1CLveQZEUpV94vix7irWwFO8siAhPKQ=).

**Events** To stay up to date with all campaign events, please visit our [Facebook Events Page](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/oXzEbLWT5PLsu3pkCGGQyXsGdvF1EHggtnv-udUfc1w=?ref=page_internal) or[ Website Events Calendar](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/dusxWrbQiIo3wA29eLGVajgEmzEsAyS1x8paTPLbyFQ=).

If you are interested in hosting a meet and greet, please contact Mary Jo at [MaryJo@abigailspanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/fpZSZSxbPsc9StkFBLjC5rNWHCbDBgcIi8UVNpKpZg0=).

If you are interested in hosting a fundraising event, please contact our Finance Director Emma Carl at [emma@abigailspanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/xInf4NSCfEEqfC00SbPMsAx4XEQeiKm4BsHHv-VKcPY=) _**Events for August and early September include:**_ **Social Security Town Hall** Please join us for a discussion on the issues facing Central Virginia seniors. We will discuss the current state of affairs, how we can protect Social Security and Medicare, and ensure we keep our promises to retirees.

Wednesday August 22nd 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM 7705 Impala Drive, Henrico, VA 23228 [RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/xOb3I6mWqMOhB8bOyFhed-nQyXbGDLXwRkPCysFYV7w=) **Midlothian Meet and Greet** Friday September 7th 6:30 PM to 8:00 PM [RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/MSyvtV1yOIDah_Y2_FcuustVEvvSBKjnjdW0dlfGh1k=?u=https%3A%2F%2Fbit.ly%2FSept7AustinRSVP&h=AT0AQ9H_x0ZlspXRX660KkGfzdEBV8UA5Z-61eaMjM2WxVXr28CWDvOQ7HbtvUuQjqSNLfE13dyMfiVfuygwplGSJPA1vAqNkNlwz4WRLLLb-Gn81ICPhIFA0ofz2hxgYw) for the address **Chesterfield Meet and Greet** Saturday September 8th 6:00 PM to 7:30 PM [RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/MSyvtV1yOIDah_Y2_FcuustVEvvSBKjnjdW0dlfGh1k=?u=https%3A%2F%2Fbit.ly%2FSept8MillerRSVP&h=AT3zkyjpma6lxhfHVP__x3cQFg5cB64OccUmMOrSPrKjsE4dfbQR5CVxBDaAcUWr6JZlfs2QBGaORbOILSuP25-FEQmNgzhj_K2wzKVY3GUEYaGFiBXfoOn9RsVvXG8rHg) for the address
**In the Media** Our first TV Ad for the general election: view on [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/NuJYvRZXSCDuZivVlErZFcQ8s5Za49aga3YVPJPIYvs=) or [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/UnhvLoWcmYOnLAjyLCG0bagskqGoEZ3i5wLdTt2bolY=)

NBC 12: [Interview with Abigail](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/rqhcR0xj-2dmRH-0YmwKtQ-5MmCJ9mC9J90APM6sMVE=)

The Washington Post: [Dave Brat is boxed in by President Trump](https://act.myngp.com/el/e0yOi4RO0MhaDumpl7PDpZ0kPZg4B_k6ADCAxizBgsw=/hjAh_TpsSDP2wXT4xGI6WUJbrstmQuFiAl-CcW2snFQ=?noredirect=on&utm_term=.d9ada1d415c0)

name: Martha Roby for Congress
subject: The Greatest Country in the World
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Martha Roby for Congress
body:
| | | | [View in browser](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=126A146A9A3853)

---
| | [](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=126A146A9A3854)
---
| | Friends,

Did you see this? Yesterday, [New York's Democrat Governor Andrew Cuomo said](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=126A146A9A3855), "America has never been that great."
**I disagree.**
[As I told Yellowhammer News](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=126A146A9A3856), I believe we live in the greatest country in the world. Many brave men and women have served and sacrificed for the very freedoms we enjoy as Americans.

For more than 200 years, our country has been a land of optimism and opportunity, and over the last year and a half, we’ve worked to foster this outlook once again.

I look forward to seeing this nation continue to prosper and grow, and I will always support commonsense policies that strengthen America first.

\- Martha

name: Team Menendez
subject: Hugin's actions don't match his words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

This tweet is about as truthful as one from Donald Trump. [](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cbb/3af3c5d/3a2b51fc/4ec3ef7c/3944177994/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augmidmonth?gpsid=5_73_2916&refcode=em18_180816_AugMM1_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180816_AugMM1_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1") "I care about people." Give us a break.

Bob Hugin has gouged cancer patients in need of life-saving medication, discriminated against women and the LGBTQ community, and donated hundreds of thousands of dollars to politicians including Donald Trump, who have hurt New Jersey families.

From his past treatment of women and gay and lesbian students at Princeton to his recent actions price-gouging Americans while cutting deals for Russia -- Hugin's "solutions" are out of line with New Jersey values.

But Hugin isn't going down without a fight. He has committed millions of his own personal fortune he made ripping off cancer patients to buy this Senate seat.

[**Help us stop Bob Hugin from buying this election and continuing his history of self-serving antics in the U.S. Senate. Chip in $3 or more today and help Democratic Senator Bob Menendez reach his mid-month goal by raising $10,000 more before the end of the name: Bob Casey
subject: Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security, affordable health care -- here's what you can do to protect working families:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e63b5/51dbcc2a/1fbf7661/3a9bd94/3996233605/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

This is important, really, and time is running out. **Our match deadline ends in just a few hours, and we are still $4,800 short of our goal.**

Ever since I voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme, Republicans have been coming after me _hard_. President Trump even traveled to Pennsylvania earlier this month: he attacked me for supporting affordable health care, for seeing his corporate tax cut for what it really was and for refusing to support the most dangerous and divisive pieces of his agenda.

President Trump would like nothing more than to replace me with his hand-picked Senate candidate, Congressman Lou Barletta. Congressman Barletta already votes with the President 99% of the time, and he's made it clear that he's running to help the President, not working families here in Pennsylvania. If we lose this seat, Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security and affordable health care are all at risk. We can't let that happen, team.

It has never been more important to make sure this campaign has the resources it needs to win, and that means that today, we need every grassroots supporter to do whatever they can to push toward the finish line. **But we only have until midnight to have every gift doubled: will you donate $5 or more right now -- before the match expires -- to protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat?**

Here's the link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/MATCH](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180816_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

I really appreciate you coming through at this crucial time.

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180816_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.

Dear Freedom Lover, Here at **PragerU** , we reach millions of young people online every week with videos that respectfully present the principles of liberty, limited government, free markets, and personal responsibility. We are opening the eyes and the minds of the next generation, one five-minute video at a time... __and the left doesn't like it__. That's why, for more than two years now, YouTube has continued to restrict access to more and more of PragerU's educational videos - simply because they present a conservative point of view. There are currently _**over 80**_ PragerU videos that are restricted - **more than double the amount of restricted videos since filing our lawsuit against YouTube.** Silicon Valley giants like YouTube continue to censor the ideas they don’t agree with. They promote their Leftist ideology and restrict conservative speech. [**Help us fight against the censorship of our videos.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjI4LThjMjA5NjA5ZTRiODQ1NjM4YjljZGYyYTRjNDU5Nzc3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8xOTYzNTEvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ&K=eBYZcDsJZYqw6kYvloGVJg) [ ](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjI4LThjMjA5NjA5ZTRiODQ1NjM4YjljZGYyYTRjNDU5Nzc3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8xOTYzNTEvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ&K=lpQ4DhQe59e2vlNGWNYsJw) From the beginning of this process, we've been prepared to pursue our lawsuit against Google/YouTube as far, and for as long as it takes to secure every American's right to freedom of speech online. Recently, we officially filed an appeal with the Ninth Circuit Court - giving us another opportunity to argue our case against the tech giant. [**We need your support, now more than ever.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjI4LThjMjA5NjA5ZTRiODQ1NjM4YjljZGYyYTRjNDU5Nzc3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8xOTYzNTEvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ&K=wOPo8TiSWGxOzdRb2fJKeA)[ ](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjI4LThjMjA5NjA5ZTRiODQ1NjM4YjljZGYyYTRjNDU5Nzc3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8xOTYzNTEvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ&K=FNj7Hd0-_Lv8n54_sgrS0A) As we continue this important fight - not just for PragerU, but for freedom of speech in America - we need to win in both the court of public opinion, and of course in the courtroom. We recently launched a public awareness video to bring much-needed attention to the issue. The video has already been viewed over 10 million times - but we still need to reach more people. We are continuing to circulate an online petition to help fight back against YouTube. We already have over 500,000 signatures — but our goal is to get over 1 million signatures so that YouTube cannot ignore us anymore. With your help we can get there. [**Can we count on your support as we fight to end the censorship of our ideas?**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjI4LThjMjA5NjA5ZTRiODQ1NjM4YjljZGYyYTRjNDU5Nzc3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8xOTYzNTEvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ&K=NtoJq8ee0uLZuneocL1oHQ) Thank you, and God bless you.
Sincerely, Marissa Streit
CEO, PragerU Dennis Prager
Founder, PragerU [ ](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjI4LThjMjA5NjA5ZTRiODQ1NjM4YjljZGYyYTRjNDU5Nzc3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8xOTYzNTEvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ&K=LHoKuq2F7vqGKuHafeTREg)

PragerU | 15021 Ventura Blvd., Suite 552 | Sherman Oaks, CA | 91403 [Unsubscribe](http://trk.listelixr.net/u/1/99260697/02-b18228-8c209609e4b845638b9cdf2a4c459777/28254928/qcjvyyvf12/tznvy/pbz?f=t)

name: Semedrian Smith
subject: Meet the Manager of Morale on Team Sherrod
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Campaign life can be frustrating when your opponent is closing in on the polls, outside spending is ramping up, and, well, it's not exactly fun to receive push alerts these days. That's why we've enlisted a Manager of Morale. **It 's none other than Franklin Brown, Sherrod's dog (and best friend!).** There's no doubt that Franklin makes Sherrod's days brighter. | [](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff8c4/4462dc26/6d3857ea/2007483d/3674659484/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e180816a")
---
And it'd be hard not to with a face like this.
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff8c4/4462dc26/6d3857ea/2007483d/3674659484/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e180816a")
---
The hard work in this campaign doesn't just happen in our headquarters. You, Peter, work tirelessly too.
Unfortunately, our Manager of Morale, Franklin, has short legs and can't cover the ground to meet each of you. Instead, we decided to put his cute mug on a mug, so everyone can have their own morale boost.
[**Visit our store to get your 2018 Franklin mug!
Don't forget to use discount code MORALE for 10% off.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff8c4/4462dc26/6d3857ea/2007483d/3674659484/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e180816a")

---
You will not only have a mug that's guaranteed to make you smile, but will be supporting our grassroots efforts to keep Sherrod in the Senate.
**If you use the code MORALE, we'll give you 10% off your mug.[Click here to get yours today.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff8c4/4462dc26/6d3857ea/2007483d/3674659484/VEsD/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e180816a")**
Thanks for everything you do!
Semedrian
Semedrian Smith
Deputy Campaign Director
Friends of Sherrod Brown

Zephyr is under attack from the right-wing media for saying she would prosecute ICE agents for any criminal behavior.
We have well-documented cases of rape, sexual abuse, and even deaths in custody due to inadequate medical care.
Which the former acting director of ICE denied the existence of:

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | I want to take a moment to thank you.

This past week, former New Mexico Governor and presidential candidate Gary Johnson jumped in the race in a last minute bid to take my Senate seat. With less than 90 days to election day, this is a game-changer. _And you didn 't miss a beat._

Thanks to our grassroots movement, we hit our rapid response fundraising goal and are rushing more resources to our organizing teams, media budget, and campaign infrastructure. We couldn't have done it without you -- **thank you.**

My team and I will continue to keep you updated about the changing state of our campaign and how you can help us defend my Senate seat in a critical year for Democrats.

Thanks for all you do,

Martin
