name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am writing to ask if you can split a $3 donation between Andrew Gillum's, Ben Jealous' and Stacey Abrams’ campaigns for governor and my work traveling the country rallying and organizing progressive victories ahead of this November’s critical elections.
body:
[1]Bernie Sanders

Sisters and Brothers,

When I ran for president, I made it clear that our campaign was not just
about one person. It was about building a movement and creating a
political revolution. Here is the very good news. In the last two years,
we have made enormous progress in achieving that goal.

First, the progressive agenda that we have supported is now the agenda of
the American people. On issue after issue whether it is health care for
all, raising the minimum wage, pay equity for women, rebuilding our
crumbling infrastructure, making public colleges and universities
tuition-free, transforming our energy system, immigration reform, criminal
justice reform and many other issues, poll after poll shows the American
people are now solidly with us. They want, we want, public policies that
represent the needs of all the American people, not just the 1 percent.

Secondly, not only are we winning the ideological debate, we are also
making enormous progress in creating the political movement we need to
implement that agenda. All over this country working people and young
people are becoming engaged in the political process, are running for
office, and oftentimes they are winning. Just in the last couple of weeks
great candidates like Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar pulled off major upsets
and will become some of the most progressive members of Congress. Wesley
Bell pulled off another great upset in Missouri and will become the
prosecutor in St. Louis County where Ferguson is located. James Thompson
won the Democratic nomination for Congress in Wichita, Kansas, and Randy
Bryce, a union ironworker, won his primary and now stands a good chance of
becoming the congressman from Paul Ryan’s very own district.

In other words, despite what you may read in the corporate media or hear
from the “punditry,” the political revolution is gaining momentum. But we
still have a long way to go. There are three great candidates running for
governor, all of whom are strong progressives and have a real shot at
winning if they have adequate resources.

That is why tomorrow I am heading to Florida to help Andrew Gillum win his
race for governor. Andrew is running his campaign on progressive ideas
like Medicare for all, repealing Stand Your Ground laws, banning assault
weapons, legalizing marijuana and a $15/hr minimum wage.

There are also two other candidates who need our help: Ben Jealous, who
with our support won his primary and now faces a tough fight to win the
governorship of Maryland. There are very few individuals I know running
for any office who have the lifetime record of progressivism that Ben
does.

And I am supporting Stacey Abrams who is running an extremely important
campaign in Georgia. If elected, she will defeat a right-wing extremist
and become the first African-American woman ever elected governor of any
state in the history of our country.

All three of these campaigns face unique challenges — all three are at a
financial disadvantage against their opponents. All three can use our help
to close that gap. So I am asking:

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/757?refcode=em180816-full&t=1001&akid=98%2E150750%2Eup67Q3 ]Can you split a
$3 donation
between Andrew Gillum's, Ben Jealous' and Stacey Abrams’ campaigns for
governor and my work traveling the country rallying and organizing
progressive victories ahead of this November’s critical elections?

Sisters and Brothers, we live in an unprecedented moment in American
history, and we need an unprecedented response. Together – black, white,
Latino, Native American, Asian American, women and men, gay and straight,
young and old – we must not allow Donald Trump and his supporters to
divide us up while they pass legislation to protect the 1 percent.

Because when we stand together as one people, united, fighting for a
progressive agenda, there is nothing, nothing, nothing that we cannot
accomplish.

Andrew Gillum, Ben Jealous and Stacey Abrams are fighting for that
progressive agenda, and I am proud to support their campaigns. I hope that
you will as well:

Make a $3
donation to Andrew Gillum's, Ben Jealous' and Stacey Abrams’ campaigns for
governor today:

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/757?refcode=em180816-full&t=1002&akid=98%2E150750%2Eup67Q3 ]https://act.berniesanders.com/go/Andrew-Ben-Stacey

Victories for these three great candidates will change America in a very
significant way. Thank you for standing with them.

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/757?refcode=em180816-full&t=1003&akid=98%2E150750%2Eup67Q3 ]DONATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.berniesanders.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=98%2E150750%2Eup67Q3
clean_body: [1]Bernie Sanders Sisters and Brothers, When I ran for president, I made it clear that our campaign was not just about one person. It was about building a movement and creating a political revolution. Here is the very good news. In the last two years, we have made enormous progress in achieving that goal. First, the progressive agenda that we have supported is now the agenda of the American people. On issue after issue whether it is health care for all, raising the minimum wage, pay equity for women, rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure, making public colleges and universities tuition-free, transforming our energy system, immigration reform, criminal justice reform and many other issues, poll after poll shows the American people are now solidly with us. They want, we want, public policies that represent the needs of all the American people, not just the 1 percent. Secondly, not only are we winning the ideological debate, we are also making enormous progress in creating the political movement we need to implement that agenda. All over this country working people and young people are becoming engaged in the political process, are running for office, and oftentimes they are winning. Just in the last couple of weeks great candidates like Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar pulled off major upsets and will become some of the most progressive members of Congress. Wesley Bell pulled off another great upset in Missouri and will become the prosecutor in St. Louis County where Ferguson is located. James Thompson won the Democratic nomination for Congress in Wichita, Kansas, and Randy Bryce, a union ironworker, won his primary and now stands a good chance of becoming the congressman from Paul Ryan’s very own district. In other words, despite what you may read in the corporate media or hear from the “punditry,” the political revolution is gaining momentum. But we still have a long way to go. There are three great candidates running for governor, all of whom are strong progressives and have a real shot at winning if they have adequate resources. That is why tomorrow I am heading to Florida to help Andrew Gillum win his race for governor. Andrew is running his campaign on progressive ideas like Medicare for all, repealing Stand Your Ground laws, banning assault weapons, legalizing marijuana and a $15/hr minimum wage. There are also two other candidates who need our help: Ben Jealous, who with our support won his primary and now faces a tough fight to win the governorship of Maryland. There are very few individuals I know running for any office who have the lifetime record of progressivism that Ben does. And I am supporting Stacey Abrams who is running an extremely important campaign in Georgia. If elected, she will defeat a right-wing extremist and become the first African-American woman ever elected governor of any state in the history of our country. All three of these campaigns face unique challenges — all three are at a financial disadvantage against their opponents. All three can use our help to close that gap. So I am asking: [ ]Can you split a $3 donation between Andrew Gillum's, Ben Jealous' and Stacey Abrams’ campaigns for governor and my work traveling the country rallying and organizing progressive victories ahead of this November’s critical elections? Sisters and Brothers, we live in an unprecedented moment in American history, and we need an unprecedented response. Together – black, white, Latino, Native American, Asian American, women and men, gay and straight, young and old – we must not allow Donald Trump and his supporters to divide us up while they pass legislation to protect the 1 percent. Because when we stand together as one people, united, fighting for a progressive agenda, there is nothing, nothing, nothing that we cannot accomplish. Andrew Gillum, Ben Jealous and Stacey Abrams are fighting for that progressive agenda, and I am proud to support their campaigns. I hope that you will as well: Make a $3 donation to Andrew Gillum's, Ben Jealous' and Stacey Abrams’ campaigns for governor today: [ ] Victories for these three great candidates will change America in a very significant way. Thank you for standing with them. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders [ ]DONATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: Here because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
Thanks for all of your support. You're putting us on track to win this Senate race. |
---
|
---
| Friend,

Two weeks out from the primary, we came to you with an ambitious two-day goal. I just got off phone with Rebecca, and I'm happy to report this team not only met our goal -- we surpassed it.

Once again, I'm blown away by your support. This grassroots team is putting us in a strong position to win this race, and I can't thank you enough.

We'll quickly use these dollars to keep spreading our message throughout the state and to prepare our critical get-out-the-vote efforts.

I'm ready to give every Arizonan a voice in the U.S. Senate, and I'm so excited for what's ahead.

Thanks for standing with us.

Kyrsten

name: Team Stanton
subject: climate champion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
_The time to deal with climate change on a national level is now. _

We can see the staggering damage it is causing -- even in our own backyard.

This isn't just about protecting our economy or our environment, it is about our future.

**As Mayor of Phoenix, Greg ambitiously confronted climate change AND grew our local economy. In Congress, he will continue to be a champion for pragmatic reform. **

name: Field Team
subject: Apply to be a fellow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Do you want to make an impact in the campaign to re-elect Senator Joe Donnelly? |
---

| | Peter --

Do you want to make an impact in the campaign to re-elect Senator Joe Donnelly? If the answer is yes (we hope it is!), **[apply to our Fall Organizing Fellowship today.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2fbd/7377f838/3aaed4ef/51f84ad4/1545577826/VEsH/ "http://indems.org/fallfellow")**

_**We are launching the largest voter contact campaign Indiana has ever seen in a midterm election.**_ We need you to help us recruit and manage volunteers, lead local voter registration and GOTV efforts, and persuade and motivate voters through canvassing and phone banking.

This is a great opportunity to pick up top-notch organizing and management skills, and to be involved with some of the most competitive races in the country.

**To apply, please visit[indems.org/fallfellow](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2fbd/7377f838/3aaed4ef/51f84ad4/1545577826/VEsE/ "http://indems.org/fallfellow"). The application is short and the deadline is Saturday, September 1.**

We are looking for fellows of all ages and experience levels. The fellowship can be remote or at your local field office. **If you know anyone else who would be a great fit, please forward this email and encourage them to apply!**

It's an exciting year to be involved in politics in Indiana. We are ready to re-elect Senator Joe Donnelly and Democrats up and down the ballot on November 6 -- but we can't to do it without you. **[Apply to our Fall Organizing Fellowship today!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2fbd/7377f838/3aaed4ef/51f84ad4/1545577826/VEsF/ "http://indems.org/fallfellow")**

Looking forward to working with you,

Campaign Field Team

P.S. Here are the awesome organizers you'll be working with. **[Apply today!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2fbd/7377f838/3aaed4ef/51f84ad4/1545577826/VEsC/ "http://indems.org/fallfellow")**
| [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2fbd/7377f838/3aaed4ef/51f84ad4/1545577826/VEsD/ "http://indems.org/fallfellow")
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

body:
President Trump offered us a chance to DRAIN THE SWAMP, and we took it! Now, we have another chance to stand with President Trump to drain the swamp..

Friend, we're starting the general with some BIG news!

President Donald Trump endorsed my campaign for Senate and, friend, I could not be more proud.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14f2747ffd6a4ef896e31c3472403895&_e=XTz-GeJcGpjVtE-2ofFLOd4dFRalsB_HFtjr_wDQDAn67LWaqnk4swL7D0EXCag6NDEtmbAUCOL30Crjqmi0bw3d-qxaBvguKgWRMF6rWTLZChbQPpUr-3jyD2VozWOn-ydYtRHfftHGxt0ON2zEPv6a8ijGVymsWRU7FyBuG18Nveve2xthBHOqolUPwrKt5UjEQ9WfmyKwNAwnXCUSZRpeTgrlPxAR--HRyQTQxho0prWkcknJNkSQ6d5K1SZ-OLqyzZEtVayFgmbMg6Nt-CeZDpCh6d8d7ZEFPLAjE3YeG4Hz3bLs_FQb88CFncaIbr-1E-5mey-F1QHtKMooonh-oK5naDgnqxQH9a6zYEtrxbI6vbuL38JcMVJD4RCYSdiYHgU2A-tM38u8Fy3sz-bC1xKCTxP-bz-S5t4sgxkoWJHKYXvE7fLQfgB7Zxz3)

Friend, this is huge for us.

If you remember right, President Trump won Wisconsin big in 2016.

And I know why!

Here in Wisconsin, we’re real, hard-working Americans who are fed up with status quo politics.

**President Trump offered us a chance to DRAIN THE SWAMP, and we took it! **

Now, we have another chance to stand with President Trump to drain the swamp and defeat Tammy Baldwin in November.

But friend, I won’t be able to do it without you. Liberals in Washington are going to do everything they can to make sure WE LOSE so Tammy Baldwin can continue her obstructionist ways in the Senate.

Today, I need you to join President Trump and chip in to help us defeat Baldwin!

Friend, the Washington establishment thinks they can silence us. They think if they spend enough money in Wisconsin, Tammy Baldwin will win, and they can continue forcing their radical agenda on Wisconsin.

They think our campaign is a lost cause!

But let me tell you, I’ve heard that a few times before:
1. Most recently, they said President Trump had no chance at turning Wisconsin red.
2. When I ran for state Senate, the elites in Madison told me, point blank, “you will never get anything done if you vote with the conservative wing in the party.”

Friend, they were wrong then. And they’re wrong now!

President Trump won bigger in Wisconsin than any Republican since Reagan, and I worked with Governor Walker to usher in an era of conservative change in Wisconsin – WITHOUT compromising any of my values.

I know there’s NOTHING we cannot do if we work hard and, friend, I can’t wait to prove the naysayers wrong once again.

With President Trump and the Wisconsin grassroots by my side, I am more confident than ever that we will defeat Tammy Baldwin and help President Trump put an END to Washington dysfunction!

[**I hope you'll join President Trump in supporting my campaign today.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14f2747ffd6a4ef896e31c3472403895&_e=XTz-GeJcGpjVtE-2ofFLOd4dFRalsB_HFtjr_wDQDAn67LWaqnk4swL7D0EXCag6NDEtmbAUCOL30Crjqmi0bw3d-qxaBvguKgWRMF6rWTLZChbQPpUr-3jyD2VozWOn-ydYtRHfftHGxt0ON2zEPv6a8ijGVymsWRU7FyBuG18Nveve2xthBHOqolUPwrKtSMJiBuRrdQurYzO-HCe8vVHcOoTanIPDSkH9HPMPuy6ck7rC6OWhmwdfYYleNi52tOkThiAN3IDUlFvoI3a0zr9c1-QQ7x6n-Sel2vqJgsWKXKnBVTmttij4X14ZFMkaN4qnLn3QbWsTSJQnWc1pDexkb3q64GxDch3EGgQGJATYNsyGL8_Pf34frANV7G-5AJh3EjzYEPXGkj-KmyZhyE8z8ZwRJWJrrtQTOreCg5HgufV0XlOwgGkeEHccMbmL)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14f2747ffd6a4ef896e31c3472403895&_e=RT-c7o5viCg26Qz3IeOzDoK9UscxldvZ2myf52wS2IbOTHkETeJ4zBUxzWqOY6tfUxwTf8JwRBcrmJ1QlqnrtfhExzf-1u290_7vGq4eAIFLTIfovl1JC2ukPZVYqh5mknMnUOVVieaJK_g0iK33_4ESePxImXYlRi4KO28MHsxjHXLTeUcoKRErPenBpOkLv_5jKQ0r6zYUiJtjZR_sQLXqIsTnkqe9dH-dMFisSExJbC5LnwdiKrODzc7h2Tmg). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14f2747ffd6a4ef896e31c3472403895&_e=XTz-GeJcGpjVtE-2ofFLOeXs2Zsb4hV2u1PPm1uThqJFnlMrRS7W1RjwiifdcpwgmrLCvEOifuhmzfkecoOb2TOdUrE0g5832CnCXMph4rmaxjM4aBhGPtc1p6J9nCrQvRsDwiKq8sl5ctWzSeNfICc_COtNnWwsWRlh8ZfOcOIUbbStgvMGGDizam7DaIBBaqjcjmEEbLlWFKHrO125BbXDOuh5JmXxHB0N1Ag68rJhKptcw5YZ-Mnsfg7rAR_bOs7Kdd8CYV6GAlOBkSvhX5rlzbYD7OV091ugZ7iDIfL6hrW81V1xSk1NeocdPr2aKK4qquvvY7dQEK_XSVQnRUoA8ZsRH4bqOa-pi1uETbndw7VbnBc7d0gn5AotJ5ck) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14f2747ffd6a4ef896e31c3472403895&_e=XTz-GeJcGpjVtE-2ofFLOeXs2Zsb4hV2u1PPm1uThqJhyIRORvGeakW5HbwdDuGmC4EJ5yg8n3CXtoP8Qyc4piLeT33Z--6x68oeoOGHORRx8yvGspiga13XmS0jPoa9AoVowmuxjX4y_Jws2Qhu9q6Lj7H99N_iPSLZuLJJ91Q_FLq_KsYVHTWA9Rh22cVOgO-ki_p4XSYPcgM4F8d2P_0LJzXmmt-0w0AbebWX7FJNcxCpoDOlVdvtMNLgyHoLjTHivEOouQOd6gnsabVnHY1fxg6SOmMqm6bjv-lKdd8heJsV_OzVRVcsbDZ6-XqhdHCoIIE-62BaWCmn6j0jVEDnthvNgEvLV3l8A9DzTwGFqZfOQMaoUoppx3DGDxRo) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14f2747ffd6a4ef896e31c3472403895&_e=XTz-GeJcGpjVtE-2ofFLOQYAjpiIUvvghgRZ5CCWgER31iwEeB3y2MNPIIj-o6LWCpc8OHp-t0_dMnUJTsHfuCD6UOarW8jeImbT-emvpSD6eC5pTnlXH-dkN3RY9K__QhMAZsECvTKr8UGkInRMZNQzPrz5s4IT__2dM4AzftxsyNfII0qi8Idr-2wPER886JeczVnK6GYLvtc49DuYfDtXaBw91EIaqGnnDPkOFevfkq6FTjdS03ARInRnDTyg6B5PiQSyW-bABYZaAQNMaQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14f2747ffd6a4ef896e31c3472403895&_e=XTz-GeJcGpjVtE-2ofFLOUIItV5bWFnlO18i2hzcvY8GDL7zWaP7uzOeiEOgjHEr46e4QCoj5DcM-npmUBwBObDiYzjSBcF-iHUvPsM1FWPEhFNQK-VH8dJbbvjUZ5hjVB0GeUG9k_QTuR9yM3yZ2-7QXSVa38LG6PEyyK-vr9Qd_wq9Y3qr3B8tmkxjPuLUXexuvulWhDvlkLi3wTIDOdKqA_59sQE8CP31kKyh_YRgp1Ot_kCYmDsgYOF-3RKerVnufbsQc1FP3WkLY89nIw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14f2747ffd6a4ef896e31c3472403895&_e=XTz-GeJcGpjVtE-2ofFLOep2Cd3J1GToxhd_O6b1wBu-gonSy1eFR3h5OQWdqjCDbrQtpyeg9G1oTvlvxIIuRhGgpNrselclDXQcJCGjCal8K8ApS6j6incYcZbWbSKNhvQGan6VZBv7L_qFeBMzTLVHEI2zAO0oRsul6l76omyPCTCdu9584ICpi7qdzVomWtkRp0E-dHM8YBbLS5XrS_mBysWgiQD1Z5qb-wxDMvqkE3U9xgs1QNl4dmQzHMtk8XNuYew9Fh2dA_boJDeBuw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14f2747ffd6a4ef896e31c3472403895&_e=XTz-GeJcGpjVtE-2ofFLOeXs2Zsb4hV2u1PPm1uThqKFEP4CS2SHyIwDIpvHIRRuFywhUYj_SvN_aF3PBn2PiTOQ60PhAxlbq6ccXU3_s1y6gD1r5l0yE9vy0-hbt8PHEwkRBswqAtmOETCpf89OwFmUTtZkPa0tMzcuT6ewgub3bVMMMpULtM4bShDgqg752fpoP8oEt8XuwZpsrp4voBr49SECQb5TnAKLx87xL4QXza0WxrCauRebqPLYk5J5ZOmmWDWQzdY9_vANVI0e4s77rQLjyhRUwnSv97CmORRaryF6RBAV72_ly8PvhvmnQEJmQsSQnv17CmtdtSaTxLlrsTcLZ5j_xwTYa_XxyI5sO3y5TgbbaPBCEfLEPN768QfSG0Fb4fjdBhailsAxQQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14f2747ffd6a4ef896e31c3472403895&_e=RT-c7o5viCg26Qz3IeOzDoK9UscxldvZ2myf52wS2IbOTHkETeJ4zBUxzWqOY6tfUxwTf8JwRBcrmJ1QlqnrtfhExzf-1u290_7vGq4eAIFLTIfovl1JC2ukPZVYqh5mknMnUOVVieaJK_g0iK33_4ESePxImXYlRi4KO28MHsxjHXLTeUcoKRErPenBpOkLv_5jKQ0r6zYUiJtjZR_sQLXqIsTnkqe9dH-dMFisSExJbC5LnwdiKrODzc7h2Tmg) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14f2747ffd6a4ef896e31c3472403895&_e=RT-c7o5viCg26Qz3IeOzDoK9UscxldvZ2myf52wS2IbOTHkETeJ4zBUxzWqOY6tfUxwTf8JwRBcrmJ1QlqnrtfhExzf-1u290_7vGq4eAIFLTIfovl1JC2ukPZVYqh5mknMnUOVVieaJK_g0iK33_4ESePxImXYlRi4KO28MHsxjHXLTeUcoKRErPenBpOkLv_5jKQ0r6zYUiJtjZR_sQLXqIsTnkqe9dH-dMFisSExJbC5LnwdiKrODzc7h2Tmg) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.
clean_body: President Trump offered us a chance to DRAIN THE SWAMP, and we took it! Now, we have another chance to stand with President Trump to drain the swamp.. Friend, we're starting the general with some BIG news! President Donald Trump endorsed my campaign for Senate and, friend, I could not be more proud. Friend, this is huge for us. If you remember right, President Trump won Wisconsin big in 2016. And I know why! Here in Wisconsin, we’re real, hard-working Americans who are fed up with status quo politics. President Trump offered us a chance to DRAIN THE SWAMP, and we took it! Now, we have another chance to stand with President Trump to drain the swamp and defeat Tammy Baldwin in November. But friend, I won’t be able to do it without you. Liberals in Washington are going to do everything they can to make sure WE LOSE so Tammy Baldwin can continue her obstructionist ways in the Senate. Today, I need you to join President Trump and chip in to help us defeat Baldwin! Friend, the Washington establishment thinks they can silence us. They think if they spend enough money in Wisconsin, Tammy Baldwin will win, and they can continue forcing their radical agenda on Wisconsin. They think our campaign is a lost cause! But let me tell you, I’ve heard that a few times before: 1. Most recently, they said President Trump had no chance at turning Wisconsin red. 2. When I ran for state Senate, the elites in Madison told me, point blank, “you will never get anything done if you vote with the conservative wing in the party.” Friend, they were wrong then. And they’re wrong now! President Trump won bigger in Wisconsin than any Republican since Reagan, and I worked with Governor Walker to usher in an era of conservative change in Wisconsin – WITHOUT compromising any of my values. I know there’s NOTHING we cannot do if we work hard and, friend, I can’t wait to prove the naysayers wrong once again. With President Trump and the Wisconsin grassroots by my side, I am more confident than ever that we will defeat Tammy Baldwin and help President Trump put an END to Washington dysfunction! Together, we'll bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington and help President Trump put America First. Thank you, friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Team Gillum
subject: Hey, get the latest tech:
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3794/9e00690/584e5e00/2402919b/461001193/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/")
Friends,

Throughout his career, Andrew has always welcomed innovative technology. So with only 12 days until the primary election, we're using some to help spread our message.

**Here are some easy ways for you to support for Mayor Andrew Gillum as Florida 's next Governor:**

**[First, let your friends and family on Facebook know you're supporting Mayor Gillum in the Democratic Primary on August 28 by changing your profile picture.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3794/9e00690/584e5e00/2402919a/461001193/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/profilepicframes/?query=andrew%20gillum&selected_overlay_id=227003747965422")** When you click the button, Facebook will automatically preview what your current profile picture will look like with the filter on it. It's easy to change which photo you want to use -- or you can take a new one.
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3794/9e00690/584e5e00/2402919a/461001193/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/profilepicframes/?query=andrew%20gillum&selected_overlay_id=227003747965422") | [](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3794/9e00690/584e5e00/2402919a/461001193/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/profilepicframes/?query=andrew%20gillum&selected_overlay_id=227003747965422")
---|---
[Change your profile picture now](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3794/9e00690/584e5e00/2402919a/461001193/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/profilepicframes/?query=andrew%20gillum&selected_overlay_id=227003747965422")
**[Second, download ForeverBLU and get a sneak peek at our free campaign supporter communication mobile application.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3794/9e00690/584e5e00/2402919d/461001193/VEsA/ "https://search.itunes.apple.com/WebObjects/MZContentLink.woa/wa/link?path=apps%2fforeverblu")** In the coming days we will share exclusive campaign updates and messages with you through ForeverBLU -- so make sure you [watch this instructional video](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3794/9e00690/584e5e00/2402919c/461001193/VEsB/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vcTZGO_5dgU&feature=youtu.be") and download the app now.
[Download from Google Play](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3794/9e00690/584e5e00/2402919f/461001193/VEsO/ "https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mesys.foreverblu") | [Download from Apple Store](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3794/9e00690/584e5e00/2402919d/461001193/VEsP/ "https://search.itunes.apple.com/WebObjects/MZContentLink.woa/wa/link?path=apps%2fforeverblu")
---|---
Together we will catapult progressive change across our state. But first, we must win the primary on August 28. So let's get our message of progressive change to every Florida voter whether that's in the field, or on your phone -- and help bring it home!

Thank you,

Team Gillum

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3794/9e00690/584e5e00/2402919e/461001193/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3794/9e00690/584e5e00/24029191/461001193/VEsHBA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/").
